name: praxis_brand_followthrough_r2
outcome_goal: Package the next Praxis Engine rename wave as a proof-backed followthrough packet without blindly renaming internal contracts that still carry real compatibility weight.
anti_requirements: Do not perform another blind global rename.
Do not mutate runtime or schema internals in this packet.
Do not treat dag_workflow, com.dag.*, or dispatch-shaped metrics as bugs unless they are still user-facing authority surfaces.

jobs.label: surface_brand_residual_audit_r2
jobs.prompt: Audit the current human-facing Praxis Engine rename against PUBLIC_NAMING.md. Produce a concise residual surface audit with three sections: confirmed aligned surfaces, still-user-facing legacy terms that should be cleaned next, and deliberate legacy terms that are acceptable because they are internal or compatibility-only. Write only artifacts/workflow/praxis_brand_residual_audit.md. Do not edit code.

jobs.label: launcher_alias_and_operator_proof_r2
jobs.prompt: Review the Praxis Engine launcher alias path and operator copy. Confirm whether scripts/praxis is now the preferred front door, where dag-ctl remains a compatibility alias, and where live operator payloads may still lag until services restart. Include exact proof commands an operator should run, the expected command/help surfaces, and any residual mismatch risk. Write only artifacts/workflow/praxis_launcher_alias_proof.md. Do not edit code.

jobs.label: contract_and_compatibility_adjudication_r2
jobs.prompt: Decide which remaining dag/dispatch/workflow terms should stay as compatibility contracts versus which deserve a later controlled migration. Focus on platform field names, MCP names, launchd labels, CLI compatibility, and JSON/API field names. Output a must-keep compatibility list, a safe-next-wave rename list, and an explicit do-not-touch-yet list. Write only artifacts/workflow/praxis_contract_adjudication.md. Do not edit code.

jobs.label: praxis_brand_followthrough_closeout_r2
jobs.prompt: Read the three Praxis followthrough artifacts from this packet and synthesize one closeout note for Nate. Keep it direct. Include: what is already done, what should be the next bounded rename wave, what should intentionally stay legacy, and the shortest possible operator proof checklist. Write only artifacts/workflow/praxis_brand_followthrough_closeout.md. Do not edit code.
